stories.headline: RBI commentary keeps bank credit quality in focus
stories.summary: Supervisory signals point to sharper lender scrutiny of unsecured and wholesale credit.
facts: Regulatory commentary is treated as a primary source signal.
Credit underwriting and portfolio monitoring are the relevant themes.

stories.headline: SEBI disclosure focus raises bar for investment communication
stories.source: Securities and Exchange Board of India
stories.summary: Market intermediaries face continued pressure to keep investor communication clear and evidenced.
facts: Regulatory updates should be checked against SEBI circulars before publication.
Marketing interpretation must avoid unsupported claims.

stories.headline: Global rate expectations reshape demand for private market income
stories.summary: Investors are reassessing income strategies as rate-cut timing remains uncertain across major economies.
facts: Rate uncertainty affects fixed-income allocation discussions.
Private market income products need risk-first framing.

stories.headline: Pre-IPO liquidity discussions return as late-stage companies stay private longer
stories.summary: Longer private-company timelines are increasing interest in secondary and unlisted-share access.
facts: Companies staying private longer can create secondary-market demand.
Suitability and liquidity risk should be highlighted.

stories.headline: Listed bond platforms see growing investor attention to predictable income
stories.summary: Curated bond access remains relevant for investors seeking transparent cash-flow profiles.
facts: Bond content must distinguish yield, credit risk, duration and liquidity.
Listed access can support transparency-led education.

stories.headline: Family offices expand private market research capabilities
stories.summary: Sophisticated allocators are demanding deeper diligence before making alternative investments.
facts: Family offices increasingly value specialist diligence.
